The '''''Retribution''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] that served the fledgling [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Corellian Resistance]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

It was purchased from the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] by the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] underground resistance and commanded by [[Bria Tharen]], serving as the mobile base for [[Red Hand Squadron]]. The vessel participated in several major engagements for the Rebels, most notably the capture of the slave-ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] and the [[Battle of Ylesia]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

The ''Retribution'' was captained by [[Tedris Bjalin]], a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]].
